THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIAMARTINEZ, GRETHEL AN INDIVIDUAL $3,794.61 PRINCIPAL, $274.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,068.61, PER COURT , PLAINTIFF FAILS TO GIVE BASIS FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AWARD. TO THE EXTENT FEES SOUGHT UNDER CIVIL CODE 1717.5 BANKS CAN'T RECOVER FEES UNDER THAT SECTION.SEE SCANNED DOC
